---
pagetitle: "Harness Engineering"
title: "[Harness Engineering]{.amber}"
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-color: "#2C3E50"
  data-background-image: figs/banner.png
  data-background-size: 24%
  data-background-position: right 20% center
  class: dark-centered
  style: text-align:left;
---

## Three shifts of focus {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/evolution-stages.qmd >}}

## The through-line {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/through-line.qmd >}}

## [Section 1]{.amber}<br>What Is a Harness {.dark-centered .center}

## Agent = Model + Harness {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/agent-equation.qmd >}}

## Containment, not replacement {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/containment-circles.qmd >}}

## Drift over the chain {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/chain-failure.qmd >}}

## What a harness handles {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/four-things.qmd >}}

## [Section 2]{.amber}<br>The Six Layers {.dark-centered .center}

## Six layers of a mature harness {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/six-layers.qmd >}}

## Layer 1 · Context Management {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/l1-context-mgmt.qmd >}}

## Layer 2 · Tool System {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/l2-tool-system.qmd >}}

## Layer 3 · Execution Orchestration {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/l3-execution.qmd >}}

## Layer 4 · State & Memory {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/l4-state-mgmt.qmd >}}

## Layer 5 · Evaluation & Observation {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/l5-evaluation.qmd >}}

## Layer 6 · Constraint & Recovery {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/l6-constraint-recovery.qmd >}}

## [Section 3]{.amber}<br>Build Your Own {.dark-centered .center}

## Stage 0 — single-agent baseline {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-0.qmd >}}

## Stage 1 — add a verifier {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-1.qmd >}}

## Stage 2 — add a planner {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-2.qmd >}}

## Stage 3 — sprint contracts {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-3.qmd >}}

## Stage 4 — interactive verification {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-4.qmd >}}

## Stage 5 — define gradable criteria {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-5.qmd >}}

## Stage 6 — stress-test on every release {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-stage-6.qmd >}}

## A starter checklist {.light-centered .center}

{{< include resources/s3-checklist.qmd >}}

## Workshop wrap {.dark-centered .center}

{{< include resources/workshop-wrap.qmd >}}
